text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Doto! Please, accept this gift
from me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-you remembered my birthday... and even got
me a p-present?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! It's only natural that I would remember!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of your present, behold! An A2-size
clear poster featuring none other than yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much. I'll take good care—no, I'll
treasure it forever!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, but... if I'm the one keeping it safe, it might
get blemished, ripped, or burned...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If that were to happen to your present... I-I don't
know what I would do!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-on second thought, y-you can have it back!
